get.description: Returns a user profile record from the database
Returns a paginated list of all members

patch.description: Sets the user status to ACTIVE, RESTRICTED, SUSPENDED, or BANNED

delete.description: Permanently deletes a user record from the database

post.description: Provisions a new member account with an optional status and membership tier

get.description: Returns authentication status and role of a user

post.description: Registers a new user using email & password
Authenticates a user using email & password
Sends a password reset link to the user's email
Resets the user's password using the token sent in the reset link
Sends an OTP to the user's email for sign-in, verification, or password reset
Verifies the OTP sent to the email and processes sign-in, verification, or check depending on type
Resets the user's password using the email OTP code
Logs out the currently authenticated user

get.description: Fetches details of the currently authenticated user session
Returns statistics summary for users, revenues, and rates
Returns a paginated list of registered upcoming events based on user access levels

post.description: Provisions a new event or webinar (Super Admin only)

get.description: Returns event details if permitted by user role

patch.description: Updates an existing event's details (Super Admin only)

delete.description: Permanently deletes an event record (Super Admin only)

post.description: Enrolls the authenticated user to the event
Marks a user's event registration as checked-in (Admin can check in others)

get.description: Returns an array of all defined event categories

post.description: Provisions a new event category (Super Admin only)

patch.description: Updates an existing event category's details (Super Admin only)

delete.description: Permanently deletes an event category from the database (Super Admin only)

post.summary: Add a material to an event
post.description: Uploads/registers a material (recording, PDF, docx, etc.) for an event (Super Admin only)

get.summary: List all materials of an event
get.description: Returns an array of all materials for a given event

delete.description: Permanently deletes a material from an event (Super Admin only)

get.description: Fetch analytics and registration breakdowns for a specific event (Admin and Super Admin only)
Returns a paginated list of user payment histories

post.description: Creates a Stripe PaymentIntent and returns a clientSecret for frontend confirmation

get.description: Returns system operational status and software version
Returns an array of all general, pastoral, and board resources
Returns an array of all defined membership packages

post.description: Provisions a new membership package with billing rules

patch.description: Updates fields of an existing membership package

delete.description: Permanently deletes a membership package from the database

post.description: Creates a new inquiry record in the database

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all contact inquiries (Super Admin only)

patch.description: Updates fields of an existing inquiry (Super Admin only)

delete.description: Permanently deletes an inquiry record from the database (Super Admin only)
